message:
feat(core): native Connection::execute_batch with no-op detection, consolidate compat layer

Promote execute_batch from the BatchExt compat trait to a first-class
method on Connection in fsqlite-core:

Core (connection.rs):
- Add pub fn execute_batch(&self, sql) with batch_is_noop() helper
- No-op detection: whitespace, semicolons, line comments (--), block
  comments (/* */) are all short-circuited without invoking the parser
- Returns ParseError for unterminated block comments
- Tests for empty/comment-only SQL and unterminated block comments

Compat (batch.rs):
- BatchExt::execute_batch now delegates to Connection::execute_batch
- Remove duplicated ~40-line batch_is_noop function
- Tests verify trait delegates correctly to core method

WASM (lib.rs):
- FrankenDb::execute_batch uses conn.execute_batch() instead of
  conn.execute(sql).map(|_| ())
- Add host-side and wasm_bindgen_test for no-op SQL handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
